creator: ludensen@gmail.com
text:
The pkg-message asks for reports.

Succesfully detected, mounted, read and wrote(5Gb image file) SD-card with this port on my Lenovo Thinkpad Yoga 1.

% uname -a
FreeBSD yoga.home 12.1-RELEASE-p10 FreeBSD 12.1-RELEASE-p10 GENERIC  amd64

THANK YOU for all the work!
